title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.150 - Failure to post rates, penalty
text:
237.150.  Failure to post rates, penalty. — If any ferryman fail to comply with the provisions of section 237.140, he shall, for every such offense, forfeit four dollars to the county.
(RSMo 1939 § 15298) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14210; 1919 § 5544; 1909 § 6487
